zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad ferch Owain於1065年出生在威爾士福林爾弗林特時，她的父親Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl22歲，母親Morwyl ferch Ednywain17歲。她於大約1080年與King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys在愛爾蘭度布林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1162年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年97歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad ferch Owain于1065年出生在威尔士福林爾弗林特时，她的父亲Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl22岁，母亲Morwyl ferch Ednywain17岁。她于大约1080年与King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys在爱尔兰度布林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1162年在英国威尔斯福林爾享年97岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Owain was born in 1065, in Flint, Flintshire, Wales, her father, Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl, was 22 and her mother, Morwyl ferch Ednywain, was 17. She married King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys about 1080, in Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1162, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 97, and was buried in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad ferch Owain est née en 1065, à Flint, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Morwyl ferch Ednywain, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys environ 1080, à Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1162, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad ferch Owain 1065 in Flint, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl 22 und ihre Mutter Morwyl ferch Ednywain 17. Sie hat um 1080 in Dublin, Irland King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1162 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Owain è nata il nel 1065 nel Flint, Flintshire, Galles, sua padre, Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Morwyl ferch Ednywain, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys circa 1080, nel Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1162, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Owainが1065年にウェールズフリントシュアイアフリントで生まれた時，父Owain ab Edwin of Tegeinglは22歳，母Morwyl ferch Ednywainは17歳であった。約1080年にアイルランドダブリンでKing Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1162年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで97歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Owain(이)가 1065년 웨일스 플린츠히르 플린트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Morwyl ferch Ednywain(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 아일랜드 드블린에서 King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Owain nasceu em 1065, em Flint, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Morwyl ferch Ednywain, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys aproximadamente 1080, em Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1162, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Owain родилась в 1065 г. в местности флинт, флинцхир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Morwyl ferch Ednywain, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys около 1080 г. в местности дублинь, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1162 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad ferch Owain nació en 1065, en Flint, Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Morwyl ferch Ednywain, tenía 17 años. Se casó con King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys aproximadamente 1080, en Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1162, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultada en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
